candidates.why: Exact total current assets line on balance sheet; directly matches ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported total current assets; inferior choice.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Balancing line and non-current, not ACT.
Non-current assets, not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the exact reported total current assets label.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Adjustment for non cash generating items
candidates.why: Not cash balance; cash flow adjustment line.

candidates.row_label: Aquisitions of subsidiaries net of cash aquired and other businesses
candidates.why: Investing cash flow item, not ending cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the year
candidates.why: Cash flow statement opening balance, but balance sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Exchange rate difference in cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: FX effect line, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Could proxy for closing cash, but balance sheet line is preferred.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet cash balance as preferred. Duplicate identical labels exist in the sheet preview; row label is still unambiguous for mapping purposes.

candidates.why: Only a component of current liabilities, not total LCT.
Component only, not total current liabilities.
Exact total current liabilities line; directly matches LCT.
Balancing line, not reported total.
Balancing line, not reported total.
Non-current liability component, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities subtotal, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities total, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Clear short-term debt component and part of baseline STD.
Explicit lease item; baseline STD excludes leases.
Cash flow movement, not balance sheet stock of short-term debt.

candidates.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases
candidates.why: Explicit current portion of long-term debt excluding leases; fits baseline STD and complements short-term debt if no clean total exists.
Current financing liability line near current liabilities section; likely short-term borrowings/current bank debt, but label also appears in non-current section so less clean.

final_choice.row_label: Current Portion of Long-Term Debt excluding Capitalized Leases

variables.notes: R:c. No clean single total current debt line with values was available. Chose the minimal non-lease components that together represent short-term debt/current maturities. Excluded lease rows per instruction and avoided using the ambiguous repeated 'Interest-bearing liabilities to credit institutions' label to reduce double counting risk.

candidates.why: Exact current taxes payable/current tax liabilities line; matches TXP.

variables.notes: Exact taxes payable/current tax liabilities label.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line corresponding to property, plant and equipment under IFRS; net total PPE-style amount.
Intangible assets, not PPE.
Balancing line and intangible, not PPE.
Intangible assets, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Intangible Assets - excluding Goodwill - Net - Total - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing/intangible line, not PPE.

variables.notes: Under IFRS, 'Tangible assets' is the reported net PPE-type total and is the best match.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet; directly matches AT.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total assets label.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow when a direct total exists.
Exact net cash flow from operating activities / operating cash flow total; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not reported operating cash flow total.

variables.notes: Selected the final operating cash flow total rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
